title: Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026

detail.title: Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026
detail.short_info: Punjabi University has declared the MA Semester 4 Re-Revised Date Sheet 2026 (NN 83) for multiple subjects including English, Political Science, History, Economics and Punjabi. Download the official exam schedule PDF from pupexamination.ac.in.

content.text: Punjabi University, Patiala has officially released the Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 for MA Semester 4 examinations. The re-revised date sheet covers multiple subjects including Political Science, Defence Studies, Sanskrit, English, Sociology, Punjabi, Public Administration, Philosophy, Religion, Linguistics, Sikh Studies, History, Economics, Hindi, Urdu, Persian, Journalism, and Women Studies (NN 83 Re-Revised). Students can access the complete schedule on the official website.

This Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 is crucial for all MA final semester students. Candidates are advised to download the official re-revised date sheet and prepare according to the updated schedule.
Download Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 PDF

links.text: Download Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 PDF

content.text: Punjabi University has issued the re-revised date sheet for MA Semester 4 examinations in 2026. The Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 includes a wide range of subjects under the postgraduate arts and social sciences stream for regular and re-appear students.

sections.heading: Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 covers MA Semester 4 examinations across multiple disciplines. Students can check the revised schedule for their respective subjects from the official notification. The re-revised date sheet ensures clarity for all candidates appearing in the 2026 examinations.
Here is the list of subjects covered under the Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026:

rows: Political Science, Defence Studies, Sanskrit, English, Sociology, Punjabi, Public Administration, Philosophy, Religion, Linguistics, Sikh Studies, History, Economics, Hindi, Urdu, Persian, Journalism, Women Studies

sections.heading: How to Download Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can download the Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 from the official examination portal. Follow these simple steps to get your copy.

items: Visit the official Punjabi University examination website.
Navigate to the Date Sheet or Examination Schedule section.
Locate the latest notification for MA Semester 4 Re-Revised Date Sheet 2026.
Click on the relevant link for your subjects.
The PDF file will open. Download and save it on your device.
Print a copy and keep it handy for exam preparation.

content.text: Always refer to the official website for any further updates or changes in the Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official Punjabi University Date Sheet 2026 contains all essential information regarding the MA Semester 4 examinations. Here are the key details mentioned in the document:

items: Course: MA Semester 4
Multiple subjects list (Political Science to Women Studies)
Re-Revised status (NN 83)
Detailed examination dates and timings
Important instructions for candidates
Guidelines for regular and re-appear students
Official examination branch information.
